{{CargoRelic
|name=Cyclops God Head
|class_id=20263
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This large, one-eyed skull came from an exceptionally powerful Cyclops. According to the information collected in his Domain, he was undoubtedly a god. However, an unknown energy struck him when he was dining. The god died on the spot. Eventually, his head was taken away, becoming part of a collection.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=31
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +1<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +2<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
